audience: Founders, product owners and development teams that need to validate or improve an application before coding
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Appdesign en UX/UI laten maken dat complexe functies omzet in duidelijke gebruikersflows en schermen.

searchIntent.question: How can we validate an app journey and interface before committing to development?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking startups, SMEs and product teams in Belgium

longTailKeywords: UX UI design for web apps
directAnswer: App UX/UI design maps users and tasks into complete journeys before technical development. Wireframes test the logic, while a high-fidelity prototype and design system make feedback and implementation more precise.
title: App design and UX/UI for digital products | VisualVibe Belgium
metaDescription: UX/UI design for web and mobile apps, from user journeys and wireframes to a clickable prototype, responsive screens and implementation-ready design systems.
factsToPreserve: UX covers logic, tasks and experience while UI covers visual screens and components
Design can be delivered without development
Existing applications can be redesigned after analysing usability issues
Responsive behaviour and important interface states are included where needed
